# The Wisdom of Questioning

- [The Wisdom of Questioning](/en/docs): A reading guide on technical questioning, inquisitive postures, and collaborative ethics.
- [introductory](/en/docs/statement)
- [synopsis](/en/docs/introduction)
- [Before you ask a question.](/en/docs/before-questions)
- In the middle of a question.
  - [In the middle of a question.](/en/docs/when-questions)
  - [Choose the forum in which you ask your questions carefully](/en/docs/when-questions/carefully-select-forum)
  - [Stack Overflow](/en/docs/when-questions/stack-overflow)
  - [Website and IRC Forum](/en/docs/when-questions/website-and-irc)
  - [Using the Project Mailing List](/en/docs/when-questions/use-project-email-list)
  - [Use meaningful and descriptive titles](/en/docs/when-questions/use-meaningful-headlines)
  - [facilitate](/en/docs/when-questions/make-questions-easily)
  - [Use clear, correct and precise statements](/en/docs/when-questions/use-correctly-sentence)
  - [Send questions using standard file formats](/en/docs/when-questions/use-easy-to-read-file-format)
  - [Precise description of the problem](/en/docs/when-questions/precisely-describe-problem)
  - [It is better to talk too much than to be precise.](/en/docs/when-questions/not-more-words-but-essence)
  - [Don't claim to have found a bug.](/en/docs/when-questions/not-say-find-bug-easily)
  - [Whispering is not a substitute for doing your homework.](/en/docs/when-questions/humble-not-substitute-homewoek)
  - [Describe the symptoms of the problem rather than your guesses](/en/docs/when-questions/describe-symptoms-not-guesses)
  - [List of issues in chronological order](/en/docs/when-questions/list-problems-by-time)
  - [Describe the goal rather than the process](/en/docs/when-questions/describe-goal-not-process)
  - [Don't ask for a private email response](/en/docs/when-questions/donnot-ask-for-private-email)
  - [Clearly articulate your problems and needs](/en/docs/when-questions/clearly-express-your-question)
  - [When asking questions about the code](/en/docs/when-questions/when-ask-code)
  - [Don't ask for your homework.](/en/docs/when-questions/donnot-ask-homework)
  - [Remove meaningless questions](/en/docs/when-questions/remove-questional-sentence)
  - [Don't put `urgent' in the title.](/en/docs/when-questions/never-write-urgent)
  - [It's not surprising that many people have bad manners.](/en/docs/when-questions/courtesy-costs-nothing)
- [post-problem-solution](/en/docs/after-questions)
- How to understand the answer
  - [How to understand the answer](/en/docs/how-to-read-answer)
  - [RTFM and STFW](/en/docs/how-to-read-answer/rtfm-and-stfw)
  - [If you still can't figure it out.](/en/docs/how-to-read-answer/if-still-not-understand)
  - [Dealing with rude responses](/en/docs/how-to-read-answer/Deal-with-offensive)
- [How to Avoid Playing the Loser](/en/docs/how-to-avoid-being-loser)
- [Some questions you shouldn't ask.](/en/docs/questions-you-cannot-ask)
- [Good and bad problems](/en/docs/good-or-bad-question)
- [If you can't get an answer](/en/docs/if-cannot-get-answer)
- [How to answer questions better](/en/docs/how-to-answer-well)
